title: moreStackable
description: Increases the stack size of nearly all mineable blocks, potions and items. An add-on for the Item Components mod.
body:
## moreStackable - Item Components addon ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ndWsqG7l/images/b1ab59a13044c43aa1ba14c79b3325bd7b3cdbf0.png) ### ✅ Features - Increases stack size of *nearly* all **mineable blocks** to 99. - _Many more items have their stack size **increased** or **doubled**, (potions, pearls, banners)_ - _while some others **remain** at 64. (doors, traps, tables, etc)_
### Requires [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/wOl8aLro) mod. For missing blocks or feedback: [issues@github](https://github.com/maevius669/minecraft-mods/issues)
## ### ``` Contact & Feedback: maevius669@discord ```
